name: healthcare-data-mcp
description: Local MCP access to public healthcare market intelligence: facilities, ownership, quality, claims, workforce, research, and compliance screening.
long_description: Runs one selected healthcare-data-mcp server over stdio for Claude Desktop. Choose from focused servers for CMS facilities, service areas, demographics, drive times, quality, health systems, finance, price transparency, referrals, workforce, claims, public records, web intelligence, provider enrollment, community health, and research trials. Optional API keys can be entered through the desktop extension configuration UI.

server_name.title: Healthcare Data MCP server
server_name.description: Registry-backed server to run. Choices: service-area: CMS hospital service areas and market share; geo-demographics: Census, ZCTA, Medicare, and HUD geography; drive-time: Routing, drive-time matrices, and access scoring; hospital-quality: CMS quality, readmission, and safety data; cms-facility: CMS facility master data and NPPES lookup; health-system-profiler: Health system discovery and facility enrichment; financial-intelligence: IRS 990, SEC EDGAR, and nonprofit finance intelligence; price-transparency: Hospital MRF and benchmark pricing; physician-referral-network: NPPES, physician mix, referral network, and leakage analysis; workforce-analytics: BLS and ACGME workforce analytics; claims-analytics: DRG, service-line, and claims analytics; public-records: SAM.gov, USAspending, CHPL, accreditation, and exclusion screening; web-intelligence: Web search and health system OSINT; discovery: Dataset catalog resources, cache status, and prompts; gateway: Remote-safe metadata gateway with search/fetch; provider-enrollment: CMS PECOS-derived provider enrollment, ownership, and CHOW; community-health: CDC PLACES community-health estimates for counties, places, tracts, and ZCTAs; research-trials: NIH RePORTER funding and ClinicalTrials.gov study activity; live-gateway: Authenticated live router for approved provider, quality, claims, compliance, community, and research tools.

SAM_GOV_API_KEY.title: SAM.gov API key
SAM_GOV_API_KEY.description: Required for SAM.gov opportunity and Exclusions API tools.

CENSUS_API_KEY.title: Census API key
CENSUS_API_KEY.description: Optional Census key for higher API limits.

HUD_API_TOKEN.title: HUD API token
HUD_API_TOKEN.description: Optional HUD USPS ZIP crosswalk API token.

BLS_API_KEY.title: BLS API key
BLS_API_KEY.description: Optional BLS key for higher API limits.

GOOGLE_CSE_API_KEY.title: Google Custom Search API key
GOOGLE_CSE_API_KEY.description: Optional Google Custom Search API key.

GOOGLE_CSE_ID.title: Google Custom Search Engine ID
GOOGLE_CSE_ID.description: Optional Google Custom Search Engine ID.

ACGME_PROGRAMS_CSV.title: ACGME Programs CSV path
ACGME_PROGRAMS_CSV.description: Optional normalized ACGME Program Search export path.

DOCGRAPH_CSV_PATH.title: DocGraph CSV path
DOCGRAPH_CSV_PATH.description: Optional licensed CareSet DocGraph import path.

MCP_GATEWAY_BEARER_TOKEN_SHA256.title: Metadata gateway bearer token SHA-256
MCP_GATEWAY_BEARER_TOKEN_SHA256.description: Recommended token hash for remote deployments.

MCP_LIVE_GATEWAY_BEARER_TOKEN.title: Live gateway bearer token
MCP_LIVE_GATEWAY_BEARER_TOKEN.description: Bearer token for live HTTP/SSE deployments.

MCP_LIVE_GATEWAY_BEARER_TOKEN_SHA256.title: Live gateway bearer token SHA-256
MCP_LIVE_GATEWAY_BEARER_TOKEN_SHA256.description: Recommended token hash for live HTTP/SSE deployments.

MCP_LIVE_GATEWAY_ALLOW_GLOBAL_BULK_SCOPE.title: Live gateway global bulk scope opt-in
MCP_LIVE_GATEWAY_ALLOW_GLOBAL_BULK_SCOPE.description: Explicit opt-in to grant mcp:bulk to every valid live-gateway token.

MCP_LIVE_GATEWAY_REQUIRED_SCOPES.title: Live gateway required scopes
MCP_LIVE_GATEWAY_REQUIRED_SCOPES.description: Required auth scopes; defaults to mcp:read.

OSRM_BASE_URL.title: OSRM base URL
OSRM_BASE_URL.description: Optional OSRM endpoint; defaults to the public demo server.

CLINICAL_TRIALS_INVENTORY_HARD_MAX.title: Clinical Trials Inventory Hard Max
CLINICAL_TRIALS_INVENTORY_HARD_MAX.description: Maximum ClinicalTrials.gov records scanned by inventory tools.

GOOGLE_CSE_CACHE_TTL_SECONDS.title: Google Cse Cache Ttl Seconds
GOOGLE_CSE_CACHE_TTL_SECONDS.description: Google Custom Search cache TTL in seconds.

GOOGLE_CSE_DAILY_LIMIT.title: Google Cse Daily Limit
GOOGLE_CSE_DAILY_LIMIT.description: Google Custom Search daily request guardrail.

GOOGLE_CSE_SESSION_LIMIT.title: Google Cse Session Limit
GOOGLE_CSE_SESSION_LIMIT.description: Google Custom Search per-session request guardrail.

MCP_GATEWAY_ALLOWED_HOSTS.title: Mcp Gateway Allowed Hosts
MCP_GATEWAY_ALLOWED_HOSTS.description: Allowed Host headers for metadata gateway HTTP/SSE.

MCP_GATEWAY_ALLOWED_ORIGINS.title: Mcp Gateway Allowed Origins
MCP_GATEWAY_ALLOWED_ORIGINS.description: Allowed Origin headers for metadata gateway HTTP/SSE.

MCP_GATEWAY_AUTH_REQUIRED.title: Mcp Gateway Auth Required
MCP_GATEWAY_AUTH_REQUIRED.description: Whether metadata gateway HTTP/SSE auth is required.

MCP_GATEWAY_BEARER_TOKEN_SHA256_LIST.title: Mcp Gateway Bearer Token Sha256 List
MCP_GATEWAY_BEARER_TOKEN_SHA256_LIST.description: Comma-separated metadata gateway bearer token SHA-256 hashes.

MCP_GATEWAY_ISSUER_URL.title: Mcp Gateway Issuer Url
MCP_GATEWAY_ISSUER_URL.description: OAuth/OIDC issuer URL advertised by the metadata gateway.

MCP_GATEWAY_PUBLIC_URL.title: Mcp Gateway Public Url
MCP_GATEWAY_PUBLIC_URL.description: Public HTTPS MCP URL for metadata gateway deployments.

MCP_GATEWAY_REQUIRED_SCOPES.title: Mcp Gateway Required Scopes
MCP_GATEWAY_REQUIRED_SCOPES.description: Required metadata gateway auth scopes; defaults to mcp:read.

MCP_LIVE_GATEWAY_ALLOWED_HOSTS.title: Mcp Live Gateway Allowed Hosts
MCP_LIVE_GATEWAY_ALLOWED_HOSTS.description: Allowed Host headers for live-gateway HTTP/SSE.

MCP_LIVE_GATEWAY_ALLOWED_ORIGINS.title: Mcp Live Gateway Allowed Origins
MCP_LIVE_GATEWAY_ALLOWED_ORIGINS.description: Allowed Origin headers for live-gateway HTTP/SSE.

MCP_LIVE_GATEWAY_ALLOW_NETWORK_BIND.title: Mcp Live Gateway Allow Network Bind
MCP_LIVE_GATEWAY_ALLOW_NETWORK_BIND.description: Explicit opt-in for live-gateway wildcard network binds behind HTTPS and locked allow-lists.

MCP_LIVE_GATEWAY_AUTH_REQUIRED.title: Mcp Live Gateway Auth Required
MCP_LIVE_GATEWAY_AUTH_REQUIRED.description: Whether live-gateway HTTP/SSE auth is required; cannot disable remote auth.

MCP_LIVE_GATEWAY_BEARER_TOKEN_SHA256_LIS.title: Mcp Live Gateway Bearer Token Sha256 List
MCP_LIVE_GATEWAY_BEARER_TOKEN_SHA256_LIS.description: Comma-separated live-gateway bearer token SHA-256 hashes.

MCP_LIVE_GATEWAY_ISSUER_URL.title: Mcp Live Gateway Issuer Url
MCP_LIVE_GATEWAY_ISSUER_URL.description: OAuth/OIDC issuer URL advertised by live-gateway.

MCP_LIVE_GATEWAY_PUBLIC_URL.title: Mcp Live Gateway Public Url
MCP_LIVE_GATEWAY_PUBLIC_URL.description: Public HTTPS MCP URL for live-gateway deployments.

MRF_DOWNLOAD_PROGRESS_INTERVAL_BYTES.title: Mrf Download Progress Interval Bytes
MRF_DOWNLOAD_PROGRESS_INTERVAL_BYTES.description: Progress logging interval for large MRF downloads.

MRF_MAX_DOWNLOAD_BYTES.title: Mrf Max Download Bytes
MRF_MAX_DOWNLOAD_BYTES.description: Maximum hospital MRF download size in bytes.

MRF_MIN_FREE_BYTES.title: Mrf Min Free Bytes
MRF_MIN_FREE_BYTES.description: Minimum free disk bytes required before MRF downloads.

PLACES_CACHE_DIR.title: Places Cache Dir
PLACES_CACHE_DIR.description: Optional CDC PLACES cache directory override.

MCP_LIVE_GATEWAY_AUDIT_LOG_PATH.title: Mcp Live Gateway Audit Log Path
MCP_LIVE_GATEWAY_AUDIT_LOG_PATH.description: Optional JSONL file path for non-secret live-gateway audit events.

MCP_GATEWAY_TOKEN_SCOPES.title: Mcp Gateway Token Scopes
MCP_GATEWAY_TOKEN_SCOPES.description: Optional semicolon-separated SHA-256 token-hash scope overrides.

MCP_LIVE_GATEWAY_TOKEN_SCOPES.title: Mcp Live Gateway Token Scopes
MCP_LIVE_GATEWAY_TOKEN_SCOPES.description: Optional semicolon-separated SHA-256 token-hash scope overrides; use this to grant mcp:bulk to selected tokens.
